allow: Bash(git commit -m 'Initial commit: Zhihu content exporter scripts *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Optimize download performance: ZIP batch mode + streamlined individual mode *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix 404 on collections API endpoint *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Merge two scripts into one unified exporter with tabbed UI *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix: handle non-string item.content \(array-type content from pins\) *)
Bash(git commit -m 'Fix fav export: better title extraction + multi-strategy content fetching + debug logging *)
